import copy
from typing import Any


def process_items(items: list[dict], config: dict[str, Any]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for item in items:
        local_config = copy.deepcopy(config)
        local_config["current_item"] = item["id"]
        result = transform(item, local_config)
        results.append(result)
    return results


def transform(item, config):
    return {**item, "processed": True}


def run_pipeline(records, settings):
    outputs = []
    for record in records:
        ctx = copy.deepcopy(settings)
        ctx["record_id"] = record["id"]
        ctx["timestamp"] = record.get("ts")
        outputs.append(process(record, ctx))
    return outputs


def process(record, ctx):
    return record
